title: FactSet Research Systems Inc. (FDS) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: FactSet Research Systems Inc. title: FactSet Research (FDS) Surpasses Q1 Earnings Estimates
text: FactSet (FDS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 10.83% and 1.19%, respectively, for the quarter ended November 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
